description: All 8 UXC contract layer definitions. The Activation Surface reads this to validate surface compliance.

contracts.name: LLM Behaviour Contract
contracts.governs: LLM output structure and prompt governance
contracts.routing_rule: All LLM calls must route through stardance-llm-service

contracts.name: LLM Integration Contract
contracts.governs: LLM invocation rules and integration boundaries
contracts.gate: DRJ gate required before first LLM call on any new system

contracts.name: State Visibility Standard
contracts.governs: Execution state and confidence surfaced to operator

contracts.name: System Navigation Contract
contracts.governs: Navigation structure and context persistence across surfaces
requirements: Navigation must not diverge across operator-facing surfaces
Context must persist across navigation transitions

contracts.name: Component Behaviour Contract
contracts.governs: Component behaviour semantics — hover states, interaction patterns, data binding, rendering
contracts.note: CBC owns behaviour semantics. UIS owns aesthetic expression. (PTC R2 ruling 2026-05-05)

contracts.name: Trust & Insight Surface
contracts.governs: Confidence, validation status, and trust signals surfaced to operator
requirements: FLAG-B01 score + band (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) must be visible
Ethics Gate trigger must identify category, not just 'blocked'

contracts.name: UI Standard
contracts.governs: Theme system, mode system, interaction surface, creative differentiation mandate
contracts.note: UIS owns aesthetic expression. CBC owns behaviour semantics. (PTC R2 ruling 2026-05-05)
contracts.grid_rule: Theme count must equal mode count. 3x3 canonical.
contracts.creative_mandate: 3 of 4 criteria required: Motion, Depth, Character, Memory
